title: Chapter Founded
description: ACM NIT Surat student chapter was established as an integral part of the International Learned Society for Computing, ACM, with a vision to inspire dialogue and resource-sharing in the field of computing.

title: 100 Members Milestone
description: The chapter crossed 100 active members and expanded its technical domains, beginning to host inter-college events and workshops across Gujarat.

title: First National Hackathon Win
description: An ACM NIT Surat team won the Smart India Hackathon regional round, putting the chapter on the national map for competitive engineering.

title: Epiphany & Dotslash Launched
description: The flagship events Epiphany and Dotslash were launched, quickly gaining nationwide recognition and attracting participants from colleges across India.

title: Digital Transformation
description: Adapted to fully remote operations during the pandemic. Launched online workshops, virtual hackathons, and a Discord community that grew to 500+ members.

title: Open Source Initiative
description: Launched the Open Source domain, with members contributing to major projects during Hacktoberfest and GSoC. Published open-source tools used by 1000+ developers.

title: National Recognition
description: Recognized as one of the top ACM student chapters in India. Hosted the Build With AI Hackathon with 200+ participants and industry mentors from Google and Microsoft.
